name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, participants
VARIABLES coordinatorState, messages, participantStates


(* Types *)
TypeOK == /\ coordinatorState \in {"Init", "Prepare", "Commit", "Abort"}
          /\ participantStates \in [participants -> {"Init", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]
          /\ messages \in [participants -> {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
        /\ participantStates = [p \in participants |-> "Init"]
        /\ messages = [p \in participants |-> "Prepare"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == /\ coordinatorState' = NextCoordinatorState
        /\ participantStates' = NextParticipantStates
        /\ messages' = NextMessages

NextCoordinatorState == 
    /\ coordinatorState = "Init" /\ messages = [p \in participants |-> "Prepare"]
    /\ coordinatorState' = "Prepare"
    \/ coordinatorState = "Prepare" /\ messages = [p \in participants |-> "VoteYes"]
    /\ coordinatorState' = "Commit"
    \/ coordinatorState = "Prepare" /\ messages = [p \in participants |-> "VoteNo"]
    /\ coordinatorState' = "Abort"
    \/ coordinatorState = "Commit" /\ messages = [p \in participants |-> "Commit"]
    /\ coordinatorState' = "Commit"
    \/ coordinatorState = "Abort" /\ messages = [p \in participants |-> "Abort"]
    /\ coordinatorState' = "Abort"

NextParticipantStates == 
    /\ \A p \in participants : 
        /\ participantStates[p] = "Init" /\ messages[p] = "Prepare"
        /\ participantStates'[p] = "Prepare"
        \/ participantStates[p] = "Prepare" /\ messages[p] = "VoteYes"
        /\ participantStates'[p] = "VoteYes"
        \/ participantStates[p] = "Prepare" /\ messages[p] = "VoteNo"
        /\ participantStates'[p] = "VoteNo"
        \/ participantStates[p] = "VoteYes" /\ messages[p] = "Commit"
        /\ participantStates'[p] = "Commit"
        \/ participantStates[p] = "VoteNo" /\ messages[p] = "Abort"
        /\ participantStates'[p] = "Abort"

NextMessages == 
    /\ \A p \in participants : 
        /\ coordinatorState = "Init" /\ messages[p] = "Prepare"
        /\ messages'[p] = "Prepare"
        \/ coordinatorState = "Prepare" /\ messages[p] = "VoteYes"
        /\ messages'[p] = "VoteYes"
        \/ coordinatorState = "Prepare" /\ messages[p] = "VoteNo"
        /\ messages'[p] = "VoteNo"
        \/ coordinatorState = "Commit" /\ messages[p] = "Commit"
        /\ messages'[p] = "Commit"
        \/ coordinatorState = "Abort" /\ messages[p] = "Abort"
        /\ messages'[p] = "Abort"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<coordinatorState, participantStates, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ states[i] = "thinking"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        /\ forks' = forks
   \/ /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
   \/ /\ states[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks[i] = i
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
   \/ /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[i] = i
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        /\ forks' = forks

(* Invariant: fork ownership *)
TypeOK == /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] \in 0..N
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] = i

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum

Init == /\ num = 0
       /\ flag = 0
       /\ maxFlag = 0
       /\ maxNum = 0

Next == /\ num' = IF flag = 0 THEN 0 ELSE num + 1
       /\ flag' = IF flag = 0 THEN 0 ELSE flag + 1
       /\ maxFlag' = IF flag = 0 THEN 0 ELSE maxFlag + 1
       /\ maxNum' = IF flag = 0 THEN 0 ELSE maxNum + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES queue, size

Init == /\ queue = <<>>
        /\ size = 0

Next == \/ /\ size < K
          /\ queue' = Append(queue, 1)
          /\ size' = size + 1
        \/ /\ size > 0
          /\ queue' = Tail(queue)
          /\ size' = size - 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<queue, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers :
              /\ r \in readers
              /\ readers' = Remove(r, readers)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in Readers :
                  /\ r \notin readers
                  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLE store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]

Next == /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(chunks) = Ceil(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(sentChunks) = 0
    /\ retransmitCount \in Seq
    /\ Len(retransmitCount) = 0

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, lastChunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks>>

    \/ /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
